name: Perfect Peppermint Patties
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the first four ingredients.
2. Add milk and mix well until smooth.
3. Roll into 1-inch balls and place on a waxed paper-lined cookie sheet.
4. Chill for 20 minutes.
5. Flatten each ball with a glass to about 1/4 inch thickness; chill for another 30 minutes.
6. In a double boiler or microwave-safe bowl, melt the chocolate chips and shortening until smooth.
7. Dip patties into the melted chocolate; place on waxed paper to harden.
8. Allow to cool completely before serving.
Yield: about 5 dozen.
